steps.title: Track the shift
steps.content: Every value in set B is $17$ microfarads greater than the corresponding value in set A. Adding the same amount to every value increases the mean by $17$ and leaves the range unchanged.

steps.title: Find set B values
steps.content:
The dot plot shows set A has mean $8\,\mu\text{F}$ and range $12\,\mu\text{F}$. Therefore, for set B,
$$8+17=25$$
and the range remains $12\,\mu\text{F}$. The answer is C.
